text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Dear Sister...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
It's getting hard to determine whether these are
letters I'm writing to you or just journal entries.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
But no matter how I frame it, it wouldn't change
the things I want to write.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
These are records so I can remember everything I
want to tell you when we someday finally get to
meet.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
So that I can share with you everything I
experienced in this life you've afforded me.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Last night, I went stargazing with the usual three.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
It feels weird calling them "the usual three." I'm
not sure if I really like it.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
But to be honest, I don't know if there's anything
else I can really call them.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Opera O was being her normal annoying self,
loudly making up names and stories about all the
stars.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (I made sure to correct everything she said.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
And despite being the one to suggest we go
stargazing, she was the first one to get sleepy.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Doto went to catch her as she almost literally fell asleep, but then they both wound up dozing off curled up next to each other.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
So, just like that time we were all at the beach, it
ended up being me and Top Road.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: We talked about the stars. A lot.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Or I should say I talked a lot. But she listened intently without seeming to get bored.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
The next morning, Curren laughed at me because
my voice had gotten all raspy. It was weird since
that's never really happened before.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Despite her laughing, it didn't make me angry like
I would expect.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I think it's because she looked so happy.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Now that I'm writing this, I realize I should show
more gratitude to Curren.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Well, that's all for today.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I have so much more to write about, but that's
why I intend to keep up this routine for a long,
long time.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I really can't wait for the day I can finally see you.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
But I shouldn't rush it. I will get to you—I just have
to do it slowly.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Little by little.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
There are some things that I want to write, but I
haven't figured out a way how.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I mean, really, I have no clue...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm talking about how I don't understand you.
choice_data_list:
Oh yeah. You said the same thing during the
holidays...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Mm-hm.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I see how hard you work, always going above and
beyond for me.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
You're someone I can't quite understand, but who
still chooses to follow me.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Oh. That's it...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm going to write just that.
